summary: A Go-based orchestration runner integrating MCP handlers, schema validation, and webhook reporting, heavily utilizing automated agent-driven test generation.
concerns: High volume of agent-generated extra test files indicates potential test bloat or flakiness
Staged but uncommitted changes suggest incomplete workflow
Recent fork bomb fix implies complex process spawning logic that may still be fragile
suggestions: Consolidate or clean up the numerous agent-generated extra test directories
Review and stabilize the process execution guards in the runner
Commit or revert the currently staged changes to maintain a clean working tree
